exercises.instructions: Sit or lie down comfortably. Tighten your pelvic floor muscles as if stopping urine flow. Hold for 5 seconds, then relax for 5 seconds. Repeat 10 times.
Lie on your back with knees bent and feet flat. Engage your pelvic floor, then lift your hips toward the ceiling. Hold for 3 seconds and slowly lower down.
Lie on your back with knees bent. Engage your pelvic floor and slowly lift one foot off the ground, keeping hips stable. Lower and alternate sides.
Quickly tighten and release your pelvic floor muscles. Perform 10 rapid contractions, rest, then repeat for 3 rounds.
Start on hands and knees. Engage your pelvic floor, extend opposite arm and leg, hold for 3–5 seconds, then return. Alternate sides.
Stand with your back against a wall and slide down into a seated position. Engage your pelvic floor and hold for 20–30 seconds while breathing steadily.
Sit or lie down comfortably. Tighten your pelvic floor muscles as if stopping urine flow. Hold for 5 seconds, then relax for 5 seconds. Repeat 10 times.
